ns1:revision.ns1:comment: add links to adjacent LUG events
ns1:revision.ns1:text:
LUG 2018 was held in Argonne, Illinois from April 24th-April 26th, 2018. Additionally, [[Developer_Day_2018-04-23|Lustre Developer Day 2018]] was held on April 23rd, 2018.
== LUG 2018 Agenda ==
=== Tuesday, April 24th === {| border=1 cellpadding=0
|- |''' 9:10 am''' |'''[[Media:LUG2018-ALCF_Harms.pdf| ALCF Update]]''' :Kevin Harms, ANL
|- |''' 9:30 am''' |'''[[Media:LUG2018-Community_Release_Update-Jones.pdf|Community Release Update]]''' :Peter Jones, Intel
|- |''' 10:00 am''' |'''[[Media:LUG2018-Linux_Lustre_client-Simmons.pdf|Progression of the Upstream Lustre client]]''' :James Simmons, ORNL
|- |''' 11:00 am''' |'''[[Media:LUG2018-Massive_Monash_University-Tan.pdf|Site update from Down Under]]''' :Gin Tan, Monash University
|- |''' 11:30 am''' |'''[[Media:LUG2018-Lustre_Feature_Renaissance-Rutman.pdf|Lustre Feature Renaissance]]''' :Nathan Rutman, Cray
|- |''' 1:30 pm''' |'''[[Media:LUG2018-Intel_SponsorTalk-Bhatki.pdf|Sponsor presentation: Intel]]''' :
|- |''' 1:50 pm''' |'''[[Media:LUG2018-Lustre_2.12_and_Beyond-Dilger.pdf|Lustre 2.12 and beyond]]''' :Andreas Dilger, Intel
|- |''' 2:20 pm''' |'''[[Media:LUG2018-Lazy_Size_on_MDS-Xi.pdf|Lazy Size on MDT: A new attribute that enables quick MDT scanning based on file size]]''' :Li Xi and Dongyang Li, DDN
|- |''' 3:20 pm''' |'''[[Media:LUG2018-Lustre_Server_On_Kernel_4_12_8-Delbary.pdf|Lustre server on kernel 4.12.8]]''' :Gael Delbary, CEA
|- |''' 3:50 pm''' |'''[[Media:LUG2018-T10PI_EndToEnd_Data_Integrity-Ihara.pdf|T10-PI: End-to-end Data Integrity Protection for Lustre]]''' :Li Xi and Shuichi Ihara, DDN
|- |''' 4:20 pm''' |'''[[Media:LUG2018-Multitenancy-Buisson.pdf|Multi-tenancy: real-life implementation]]''' :Sebastien Buisson, DDN
|- |''' 4:50 pm''' |'''[[Media:LUG2018-OpenSFS_Test_Cluster-Altiparmak.pdf|Test cluster presentation]]''' :Nihat Altiparmak, University of Louisville
|}
=== Wednesday, April 25th === {| border=1 cellpadding=0
|- |''' 9:00 a.m.''' |'''[[Media:LUG2018-DDN_Sponsor-Trindle.pdf|Sponsor presentation: DDN]]''' :
|- |''' 9:20 a.m.''' |'''[[Media:LUG2018-Theta_Lustre_Performance_Investigations-Tessier.pdf|Empirical Study of I/O Performance of Lustre-based Storage System on a Cray XC40 Supercomputer]]''' :Paul Coffman, ANL
|- |''' 9:50 a.m.''' |'''[[Media:LUG2018-High_Performance_Profiling-Harr.pdf|High-performance Profiling of High-performance Parallel File Systems]]''' :Cameron Harr, LLNL
|- |''' 10:50 a.m.''' |'''[[Media:LUG2018-Small_File_IO_Perf_DataOnMDT-Gmitter.pdf|Small File IO Performance in Lustre]]''' :Joe Gmitter, Intel
|- |''' 11:20 a.m.''' |'''[[Media:LUG2018-Small_IO_Performance_Improvements-Farrell.pdf|Small I/O Performance Improvements in Lustre]]''' :Patrick Farrell, Cray
|- |''' 11:50 a.m.''' |'''[[Media:LUG_2018_EOFS-UpdateV2.pdf|EOFS update and ISC 2018 activities]]''' :Hugo Falter, EOFS
|- |''' 1:30 p.m.''' |'''[[Media:LUG2018-Cray_Vendor_Presentation-Schumann.pdf|Sponsor Presentation: Cray Lustre and Storage Update]]''' :Nathan Schumann
|- |''' 1:50 p.m.''' |'''[[Media:LUG2018-Lustre_Persistent_Client_Cache-Xi.pdf|Lustre Persistent Client Cache: A client side cache that speeds up applications with certain I/O patterns]]''' :Li Xi, DDN
|- |''' 2:20 p.m.''' |'''[[Media:LUG2018-Lustre_ZFS_Update-Dilger.pdf|Lustre ZFS]]''' :Andreas Dilger, Intel
|- |''' 3:20 p.m.''' |'''[[Media:LUG2018-LNet_RoadMap-Shehata.pdf|LNet Roadmap]]''' :Amir Shehata, Intel
|- |''' 3:50 p.m.''' |'''[[Media:LUG2018-Wide_Area_Throughput_LNet_Routers-Rao.pdf|Analytics of Wide-Area Lustre Throughput Using LNet Routers]]''' :Nageswara Rao, ORNL
|- |''' 4:20 p.m.''' |'''[[Media:LUG2018-LNet_Multi_Rail_at_NASA_Ciotti_Shehata.pdf|LNet Multi-Rail at NASA]]''' :Amir Shehata, Intel; Bob Ciotti, NASA
|- |''' 4:40 p.m.''' |'''[[Media:OpenSFS_LUG2018.pdf|OpenSFS Update (20 min)]]''' :
|}
=== Thursday, April 26th === {| border=1 cellpadding=0
|- |''' 9:00 a.m.''' |'''[[Media:Prosperetti-LUG2019.pdf|LUG 2019 announcement]]''' :Dr. Andrea Prosperetti
|- |''' 9:10 a.m.''' |'''[[Media:LUG2018-IO500-Lofstead.pdf|IO500: Creating a Meaningless Single Number to Appease Human Irrationality]]''' :Jay Lofstead, Sandia
|- |''' 9:40 a.m.''' |'''[[Media:LUG2018-Robinhood_client_server-Larko.pdf|Robinhood Policy Engine: using client/server model]]''' :Megan Larko, BAE Systems
|- |''' 10:10 a.m.''' |'''[[Media:LUG2018-Lustre_iRODS_Connector-James.pdf|Lustre iRODS Connector]]''' :Open Source Data Management for a Parallel File System
|- |''' 11:10 a.m.''' |'''[[Media:LUG2018-Globus-Wagner.pdf|Sponsor presentation: Globus (20 min)]]''' :Rick Wagner
|- |''' 11:30 a.m.''' |'''[[Media:LUG2018-IML_Roadmap_and_Development_Community-Grund.pdf|IML Roadmap and Development Community]]''' :Joe Grund, Intel
|- |''' 12:00 p.m.''' |'''[[Media:LUG2018-Lustre_Data_on_MDT_An_Early_Look-Leers.pdf|Early Performance Investigation of Data on Metadata]]''' :Frank Leers and Shuichi Ihara, DDN
|- |''' 12:30 p.m.''' |'''[[Media:LUG2018-Lustre_at_Uber-Cobb_Xiong.pdf|Lustre at Uber]]''' :Nick Cobb and Jinshan Xiong, Uber ATG
|} [[Lustre User Group 2017|<- LUG'17]] | [[Lustre User Group 2019|LUG'19 ->]]
[[Category: LUG]] [[Category: Events]]
